name: Lemon Cranberry Pie
recipeIngredient: Pastry for a 9-inch one-crust pie -- baked
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Prepare the pastry.
3. In a small saucepan, combine cranberry sauce, cornstarch, and sugar over medium heat until thickened and bubbly.
4. Spoon the mixture into the pastry shell.
